metadata.title: Video to Prompt Use Cases
metadata.description: Explore practical ways creators, marketing teams, and production operators use video-to-prompt workflows.

showcases.title: Practical Video-to-Prompt Use Cases
showcases.description: Four common ways teams turn raw reference clips into reusable prompt assets.

items.title: Reenact a Creator Reference Clip
items.description: Turn one creator video into a reusable prompt package for style transfer, reenactment, and faster prompt iteration.

items.title: Translate Winning Ads Into Variants
items.description: Analyze high-performing ad footage and convert it into prompt building blocks for new variations and testing loops.

items.title: Create Shot Lists for Production Teams
items.description: Break a reference video into scene logic and shot order so producers can align planning with generation output.

items.title: Build a Reusable Prompt Library
items.description: Standardize incoming references into searchable prompt assets for teams that need consistency across projects.
